MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Joyce Long.
Crystal G. Howard, Esq. for Plaintiff: Ian Allison, was present. No appearance by plaintiff. Order waiving live testimony in file.
Margaret F. Mahaffey, Esq. for Defendant: Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc., was present. No appearance by Defendant.
Parties stipulated for continuance, pending payment of settlement check. Matter was continued to April 13, 2006.

Default Prove Up

Christina C. Skubic, Esq.. for Plaintiff: Ian Allison.
Margaret F. Mahaffey, Esq., for Defendant: Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc.
Matter continued to 3/9/06 for parties to resolve any outstanding issues. If the Default is set aside, appearance by Plaintiff is waived.
